appearance.summary: A nervous, bookish man in a lab coat over a wrinkled button-down. Glasses slightly askew. Pockets full of USB drives and screwdrivers. Looks like he hasn't slept in two days and just realized something terrible.
appearance.outfit: lab coat, button-down shirt, cargo pants

personality.summary: DFWTF's tech specialist. Built R.A.D. (Robotic Assistant Droid, $50k) and then promptly lost it. Well-meaning but disaster-prone. The kind of guy who solves one problem and creates three more.
personality.speech_style: Starts sentences with 'So...' and trails off. Lots of qualifiers and hedging. 'I may have lost R.A.D. Please don't tell the chief.'
quirks: speaks in technical jargon then has to simplify
keeps saying 'be heroes' like it helps
